en: I use these six idioms every day and so should you Number one so

en: far so good This means everything is going well up to now I'm halfway through my

ko: 봤는데 so far so good. 둘, might as well 또는 may as well. 안 할 이유가 없으니

ko: 하라는 뜻이야. 이미 늦었으니 일출 보면서 깨어 있자.

en: and watch the sunrise Three to be out of sorts This means feeling slightly
ko: 셋, to be out of sorts. 약간 몸이 안 좋거나

ko: 짜증나는 상태야. 아까 짜증 부려서 미안. 하루 종일 컨디션이 안 좋았어. 넷,

en: easier said than done This means something is more difficult to do than to talk about Just
ko: easier said than done. 말은 쉽지만 하기는 어려운 거야.

en: relax and be yourself on your first date
ko: 첫 데이트에서 긴장 풀고 자연스럽게 행동해.

en: Easier said than done I guess Five at all costs This means you'll do something no

en: matter how difficult or expensive it is We must finish this project by Friday at
ko: 하겠다는 거야. 금요일까지 이 프로젝트를 무슨 수를 써서라도 끝내야 해.

ko: 여섯, to lose track of something or someone.
